reviews.comment:
Mala atencion de playeros
No limpian vidrios
Cargando combustible salto la manguera y csyo combustible en el auto y el piso
Solo limpio el piso
Y es ACA

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from gas station attendants. They don't clean windshields. While refueling, the hose popped off and spilled fuel on the car and the floor. They only cleaned the floor. And this is ACA (Central American Gas Station).
